name: Buzzard's Breath Chili
recipeIngredient: 3 tablespoons Lard, butter, or bacon drippings
8 pounds Beef chuck, coarse grind or 8 pounds Beef round, coarse grind
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the lard, butter, or bacon drippings in a large heavy pot over medium heat. Add the onions and cook until they are translucent.
2. Combine the beef with the garlic, hot red chile, cumin, and oregano. Add this meat-and-spice mixture to the pot with the onions. Break up any lumps with a fork and cook, stirring occasionally for about 1/2 hour, until the meat is evenly browned.
3. Add the tomato sauce, water, salt, and optional parsley. Bring to a boil, then lower the heat and simmer, uncovered, for 1 hour.
4. Stir in the corn flour (masa harina) to achieve the desired consistency.
5. Cook for an additional 10 minutes, stirring. Taste and adjust seasonings.
